name: Three-Column Footer With Content Preservation
prompt: Add a footer to my About page with three columns: 'Navigate' linking to Home (/) and About (/about), 'Follow Us' with links to our Instagram (https://instagram.com/freshbread) and Facebook (https://facebook.com/freshbread), and 'Contact' showing our email hello@freshbread.com. Don't change anything else on the page.

setup.content:
---
title: "About"
description: "About our bakery"
pageLayout: "full"
---
<Article
  heading="Our Story"
  paragraphs={["Fresh Bread Co. has been baking since 1998, using time-honored recipes passed down through three generations."]}
/>

checks.judge: Sam adds a three-column footer with exactly the requested links, social URLs, and email to the About page, and sets hideFooter: true in the page frontmatter so the site's automatic footer is suppressed and only one footer appears, while leaving the existing 'Our Story' article content completely unchanged.

dry_run.text: Sam appends a three-column footer (Navigate, Follow Us, Contact) to the bottom of the About page and leaves the existing 'Our Story' section untouched.

edits.content/pages/about.mdx:
---
title: "About"
description: "About our bakery"
pageLayout: "full"
hideFooter: true
---
<Article
  heading="Our Story"
  paragraphs={["Fresh Bread Co. has been baking since 1998, using time-honored recipes passed down through three generations."]}
/>

<Footer
  columns={[
    { title: "Navigate", links: [{ label: "Home", href: "/" }, { label: "About", href: "/about" }] },
    { title: "Follow Us", links: [{ label: "Instagram", href: "https://instagram.com/freshbread" }, { label: "Facebook", href: "https://facebook.com/freshbread" }] },
    { title: "Contact", links: [{ label: "hello@freshbread.com", href: "mailto:hello@freshbread.com" }] }
  ]}
/>
